ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "movie_title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "movie_info" TEXT /* Synopsis or brief information about the movie */,
  "critics_consensus" TEXT /* Critics' consensus summary for the movie */,
  "rating" TEXT /* MPAA rating of the movie (e.g., R, PG-13) */,
  "in_theaters_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released in theaters */,
  "on_streaming_date" TEXT /* Date the movie became available on streaming platforms */,
  "runtime_in_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the studio that produced the movie */,
  "tomatometer_status" TEXT /* Tomatometer status (e.g., Fresh, Rotten) */,
  "tomatometer_rating" INTEGER /* Tomatometer rating (percentage) */,
  "tomatometer_count" INTEGER /* Number of critics who rated the movie */,
  "audience_rating" INTEGER /* Audience rating (percentage) */,
  "audience_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who rated the movie */,
  "production_budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the production of the movie */,
  "box_office_gross" TEXT /* Total box office revenue generated by the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL to the official trailer of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL to the official poster of the movie */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "release_year" TEXT /* Year the movie was released */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Short, catchy phrase that summarizes the movie's theme or plot */,
  "mpaa_rating_description" TEXT /* More detailed description of the MPAA rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_studio_id FOREIGN KEY ("studio_id") REFERENCES studios ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studios" (
  "studio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each studio */,
  "studio_name" TEXT /* Name of the studio */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the studio was founded */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the studio's headquarters */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the studio's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the studio's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("studio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to an icon representing the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-genre association */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_genres_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the director */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_directors" (
  "movie_director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-director association */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_directors_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "writers" (
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each writer */,
  "writer_name" TEXT /* Name of the writer */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the writer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the writer */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the writer */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_writers" (
  "movie_writer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-writer association */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "writer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the writer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_writer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_writers_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_writers_writer_id FOREIGN KEY ("writer_id") REFERENCES writers ("writer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Name of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the actor */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "movie_cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie-cast association */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_cast_id FOREIGN KEY ("cast_id") REFERENCES cast ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_cast_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is verified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rated the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-100) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "is_spoiler" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the review contains spoilers */,
  "is_recommend" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user recommends the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audience_ratings" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "audience_rating" INTEGER /* Aggregated audience rating (1-100) */,
  "audience_count" INTEGER /* Number of users who rated the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tomatometer_ratings" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "tomatometer_status" TEXT /* Tomatometer status (e.g., Fresh, Rotten) */,
  "tomatometer_rating" INTEGER /* Tomatometer rating (1-100) */,
  "tomatometer_count" INTEGER /* Number of critics who rated the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "is_spoiler" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the review contains spoilers */,
  "is_recommend" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user recommends the movie */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, review, rate) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the movie */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
